mapper.sql: r.recruit_no AS recruitNo, r.writer_no AS writerNo, m.member_id AS writerId, r.title, r.department, r.career, r.recruit_type AS recruitType, r.start_date AS startDate, r.end_date AS endDate, r.note, r.status, r.reg_date AS regDate

choose.otherwise: ( r.department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.career LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.recruit_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT FROM recruit r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.member_no ORDER BY r.recruit_no DESC

SELECT FROM recruit r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.member_no ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.status = '모집중' AND (r.start_date IS NULL OR r.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (r.end_date IS NULL OR r.end_date >= CURDATE()) THEN 0 WHEN r.status = '모집중' AND r.start_date > CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, r.recruit_no DESC
SELECT FROM recruit r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.member_no WHERE r.recruit_no = #{recruitNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruit r WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.department = #{department}

SELECT FROM recruit r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.member_no
ORDER BY r.recruit_no DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM recruit r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.writer_no = m.member_no WHERE r.recruit_no = #{recruitNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruit(writer_no, title, department, career, recruit_type, start_date, end_date, note, status, reg_date) VALUES(COALESCE(#{writerNo}, 1), #{title}, #{department}, #{career}, #{recruitType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{note}, COALESCE(#{status}, '모집중'), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE recruit SET writer_no = #{writerNo}, title = #{title}, department = #{department}, career = #{career}, recruit_type = #{recruitType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, note = #{note}, status = #{status} WHERE recruit_no = #{recruitNo}
